positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a crescent moon cradling a nebula swirl of deep indigo, sapphire blue, and luminous gold dust. The overall design features thick, clean silhouettes with strong contrasting edges. The composition is perfectly centered, embodying cosmic elegance. Style: Mid-Century Modern illustration mixed with Art Deco geometry, evoking a sophisticated celestial map. Color Direction: Limited, highly saturated cosmic palette (deep blues, gold accents, off-black contrast). Lighting: Dramatic, emanating only from the central 'nebula' and crescent edges. Print-friendly details: Vector art quality, suitable for single-color screen printing or high-contrast DTG print on apparel, maximizing clean lines and negative space.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, low detail, text, signature, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, photographic, realism, gradient skin, dirty, messy lines, poor contrast
